id.description: User ID, serves as the primary key.

messages.description: An array of message objects from the user. Each object contains text, audioUrl, timestamp, and voice.

npcs.description: Array of NPC objects with position, name, and associated user IDs for response pool

discovered_by.description: Username of the first player to discover this chunk

id.description: Unique identifier for the conversation message

username.description: Username of the sender if author is 'user'

text.description: The text content of the message

audio_urls.description: An array of audio URLs for the message

database.instructions: The world is divided into chunks. Each chunk can contain multiple NPCs. NPCs are procedurally generated when a chunk is first discovered and their response pools grow as players interact with them.
